headlines.title: Democratic socialist Kiros defeats longtime incumbent in Colorado primary
headlines.snippet: Former lawyer Melat Kiros, 29, has criticised Democrats for support of Israel during its genocidal war on Gaza.

headlines.title: ‘I did nothing wrong’: Sweden’s migration regime hardens, upending lives
headlines.snippet: Once a European nation receiving large numbers of refugees and migrants, Sweden completes a decade-long overhaul.

headlines.title: Why is MAGA in meltdown over the Supreme Court birthright ruling?
headlines.snippet: The US Supreme Court has rejected Trump’s bid to stop the children of some immigrants obtaining US citizenship at birth.

headlines.title: Gojek co-founder, turned Indonesian Education Minister jailed for 10 years
headlines.snippet: Gojek co-founder and former Education Minister Nadiem Makarim has been sentenced to 10 years in prison.

headlines.title: Tutoring centre roof collapses killing 14 children in Pakistan
headlines.snippet: At least 14 children were killed when the roof of a private tutoring centre collapsed outside Lahore, Pakistan.

headlines.title: UN says one million remain displaced in Lebanon by Israel's war on country
headlines.snippet: UN says one million remain displaced in Lebanon by Israel's war on country The UN’s humanitarian coordinator in Lebanon says about one million people remain displaced by Israel’s war on the country, which has continued since March.

headlines.title: Trump administration yet to accept Iran school strike findings
headlines.snippet: Trump administration yet to accept Iran school strike findings The Trump administration has not accepted direct responsibility for a strike on a school in Iran, The Associated Press reports.

headlines.snippet: Netanyahu says Gaza ethnic cleansing remains on agenda Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has defended his record in an interview with the right wing Channel 14 broadcaster as he prepares for elections later this year.

headlines.title: US lawmakers push bill to halt $3.3bn in military aid to Israel
headlines.snippet: US lawmakers push bill to halt $3.3bn in military aid to Israel Palestinian-American Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib says she will support a bill seeking to block about $3.3bn in US military aid to Israel, before a vote expected later this week.

headlines.title: Israel's 'kill first' strategy is now aimed at Turkey. Will the region respond?
headlines.snippet: Israel's military strategy, described as 'kill first,' is now reportedly being directed towards Turkey. This shift raises questions about potential regional responses to Israel's actions and the evolving geopolitical landscape.

headlines.title: US NATO Envoy Presses Europe to Bear More Ukraine Cost
headlines.snippet: A US envoy to NATO has urged European nations to assume a greater share of the costs associated with supporting Ukraine. This call highlights ongoing discussions within the alliance regarding burden-sharing.

headlines.title: Vance Says ‘More Game to Play’ in Iran Negotiations
headlines.snippet: J.D. Vance indicated that there are still significant aspects to be addressed in the ongoing negotiations concerning Iran. His statement suggests that a resolution is not yet finalized and further discussions are anticipated.

headlines.title: Venezuela quake deaths rise to 1,943, lawmaker says
headlines.snippet: The death toll from earthquakes in Venezuela has risen to 1,943, according to a lawmaker. This figure underscores the devastating impact of the seismic events on the country.

headlines.title: Can Lebanon Really Disarm Hezbollah?
headlines.snippet: The question of whether Lebanon can effectively disarm Hezbollah is being raised amid regional security concerns. This issue is central to discussions about stability in the region.

headlines.title: Israeli fighter jets scrambled after airliner accidentally reports hijacking
headlines.snippet: Israeli fighter jets were scrambled as a precautionary measure after an airliner mistakenly reported a hijacking incident. The situation was quickly assessed and resolved.

headlines.title: Syrian parliament set to announce Sharaa's pick of 70 MPs
headlines.snippet: Syria's parliament is preparing to announce the final selection of 70 Members of Parliament. Once announced, the new legislature will commence its work of debating and approving new laws.

headlines.title: Man arrested after arson attack on Dublin Islamic centre
headlines.snippet: A man has been arrested in connection with an arson attack on an Islamic center in Dublin. The incident occurred after worshippers had finished their afternoon prayers, and thankfully, no injuries were reported.

headlines.title: US Supreme Court rejects Trump bid to end birthright citizenship
headlines.snippet: The US Supreme Court has rejected a bid by Trump to end birthright citizenship. Chief Justice John Roberts affirmed that individuals born in the United States are citizens by birth under the Fourteenth Amendment.

headlines.title: Iran prepares for late supreme leader's funeral later this week
headlines.snippet: Iran is preparing to hold a funeral ceremony for its late supreme leader later this week. Representatives from approximately 30 countries are expected to attend the event.

headlines.snippet: Despite a ceasefire, fresh Israeli strikes on Gaza have set fire to approximately 200 tents. These attacks have left thousands of people displaced and without shelter.
